name: ZygoSwap
description: The future is now. ZygoSwap a decentralized exchange (DEX) on the BNB Chain, providing a fully optimized and customizable trading for any BNB-listed tokens. Key Features: 1. Lowest swapping and trading fees. 2. $ZYGO holders receive 50% reduced fees on swaps and liquidity provision (no minimum holding required). 3. Zero fees for swapping or trading $ZYGO itself. 4. Ability to swap, buy, trade, and provide liquidity for any token on the BNB Chain. 5. Mobile-friendly interface for seamless on-the-go use. 6. ZSwap liquidity rewards token and staking options for additional earnings. Benefits: 1. Cost-efficient for frequent traders and liquidity providers due to significantly lower fees. 2. Deflationary, Fees generated are used to buy back and burn $ZYGO & $ZSWAP tokens. 3, Enhanced incentives for $ZYGO holders, including reduced costs and future rewards/staking yields. 4. Rewards for large swaps/buys and community engagement (e.g., airdrops for retweets/follows). 5. Optimized offering faster, cheaper transactions in the BNB Chain DeFi ecosystem.
